The story

About Jay

For as long as I can remember I've been familiar with this deep-seated instinct within me. It told me the path my life would progress in and that regardless of where it takes me, I was obligated to this precondition.

"Perhaps you've had a similar experience — something that called out to you profoundly and felt essential to your existence."

Out of Pittsburgh, Pennsylvania, Jay Trainer has spent years quietly building a body of work rooted in storytelling, acoustic honesty, and the kind of songs that feel like they've always existed — waiting to be discovered in the fog.

From intimate recordings by firelight to wider studio sessions, each record is a chapter. The music doesn't chase trends. It grows like old trees — slowly, with deep roots, shaped by weather and time.

Words

The Journal

February 2026
On Writing Songs in the Dark Hours

There is something about 2am that strips away the performance of creativity and leaves only the thing itself — the compulsion, the phrase, the chord that won't let you sleep.

Read More
January 2026
Recording by Firelight: The Making of the Deluxe Edition

We didn't set out to make an expanded record. It just kept growing. Three more songs, a different season, the same room. Here's what happened.

Read More
December 2025
Roots — On Place, Memory, and Why Pittsburgh Matters

Every song I've ever written is somehow about the same thing: where you come from, and what it costs you to leave, and what it means to stay.
